{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Matotano Shrine
| native_name = 圓田神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Matotano Shrine
| native_name = 圓田神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Matotano Shrine
| native_name = 圓田神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Matotano Shrine | native_name = 圓田神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Matotano Shrine | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Matotano Shrine'''|圓田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].
